hooks.command: for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$PWD/.agents/hooks/gate-reminder.py" --record; done; exit 0
for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$PWD/.agents/hooks/gate-reminder.py" --check; done; exit 0
for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$PWD/.agents/hooks/harness-review-reminder.py"; done; exit 0
for p in python3 python py; do "$p" -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "$PWD/.agents/hooks/worklog-reminder.py"; done; exit 0
